heading: Carbon capture
label: 17251 Carbon capture
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

Short TitleSubtitle A (§§ 701–708) of title VII of , which is classified principally to this part, is known as the “Department of Energy Carbon Capture and Sequestration Research, Development, and Demonstration Act of 2007”. See Short Title note set out under .Pub. L. 110–140section 17001 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out a program to demonstrate technologies for the large-scale capture of carbon dioxide from industrial sources. In making awards under this program, the Secretary shall select, as appropriate, a diversity of capture technologies to address the need to capture carbon dioxide from a range of industrial sources.

children.label: A
children.text: carries out the large-scale capture (including purification and compression) of carbon dioxide from industrial sources;

children.label: B
children.text: provides for the transportation and injection of carbon dioxide; and

children.label: C
children.text: incorporates a comprehensive measurement, monitoring, and validation program.

children.heading: Capacity
children.label: A Capacity
children.text: Projects that will capture a high percentage of the carbon dioxide in the treated stream and large volumes of carbon dioxide as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: i
children.text: a field testing validation activity under ; orsection 16293 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: other geologic sequestration projects approved by the Secretary.

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: 4 Requirement
children.text: For projects that generate carbon dioxide that is to be sequestered, the carbon dioxide stream shall be of a sufficient purity level to allow for safe transport and sequestration.

children.heading: Cost-sharing
children.label: 5 Cost-sharing
children.text: The cost-sharing requirements of for research and development projects shall apply to this section.section 16352 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out this section $200,000,000 per year for fiscal years 2009 through 2013.
